publicV1.reason: Only the internal workspace-materialization retry loop (packages/sandbox/src/workspace/git.ts) and the internal terminal-output failure classifier (apps/api/src/agent-runtime) change; no /v1 operation, schema, status code, or error body is touched — task failure codes reuse the existing enum values.

mcp.reason: No MCP tool, argument, result, registration, or transport behavior changes.

openapi.reason: The OpenAPI projection covers Public V1 only; nothing it projects changes.

apiPlayground.reason: The Playground catalogs Public V1 operations only and gains no entry from internal provisioning/classifier fixes.

internalOnly.reason: Repository transfer retries transient network failures (bounded attempts inside the unchanged materialization deadline, per-attempt diagnostics with distinct operation identities); git stderr signatures map to the existing typed causes instead of unknown; runtime output normalization converts TUI cursor-positioning into line structure so the claude auth classifier fires on real PTY bytes (pinned by the captured production session fixture).
